data.title: 160 Health Expands “160AI Hospital” Network to 102 Public Institutions in China
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

160 Health International Ltd. ( (HK:2656) ) has shared an update.

160 Health International Limited reported that from January 2025 to March 31, 2026, its “160AI Hospital” collaboration model expanded to 102 public medical institutions, up from 82 at the end of 2025. Of these, 54 are Class IIIA and 78 are Class III or above, underscoring strong traction in China’s high-end hospital segment and broad recognition of the Group’s digital healthcare capabilities.

The partner hospitals collectively handle about 84.37 million outpatient visits annually and generate around RMB99.7 billion in yearly revenue, highlighting the substantial operational scale underpinning the company’s platform. Management said the model has moved from pilot to large-scale rollout, and the Group is accelerating deployment of its “Medical Digital Staff” AI systems to deepen integration in clinical workflows, further extend its national network, and support high-quality growth of its digital healthcare business, while cautioning that overall performance remains subject to market and policy uncertainties.

More about 160 Health International Ltd.

160 Health International Limited is a Hong Kong–listed company operating in the digital healthcare and wellness solutions sector. Its core offerings include the “160AI Hospital” operational collaboration model and related AI-enabled systems, aimed at supporting the digital transformation and intelligent upgrading of public medical institutions, particularly higher-tier Class III hospitals across China.

Average Trading Volume: 1,075,055

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.description:

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Manycore Tech Inc. ( (HK:0068) ) has provided an update.

Manycore Tech Inc. has announced the full exercise of the over-allotment option in its global share offering, resulting in the issuance of 24,092,500 additional shares, or about 15% of the initial offer size, at HK$7.62 per share. The new shares, which will commence trading on April 23, 2026, will be used to return stock borrowed from Wintermatch International Limited, bringing the company’s total issued share capital to 1,726,199,340 shares and slightly increasing the public float, signaling strong demand for the IPO and reinforcing market confidence in the stock.

Following the completion of the over-allotment, shares issued under the global offering will account for 10.70% of the company’s enlarged share capital, compared with 9.45% previously. The adjustment reflects a modest dilution of existing holdings but supports liquidity and trading stability in the post-listing period, while another announcement is expected after the end of the stabilization period under Hong Kong securities rules.

More about Manycore Tech Inc.

Manycore Tech Inc., incorporated in the Cayman Islands, is a technology company listed on the Main Board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under stock code 00068. The company recently conducted a global offering of its shares, targeting international investors through both Hong Kong and overseas tranches to broaden its shareholder base and enhance its capital structure.

Ling Yue Services Group Limited ( (HK:2165) ) has shared an update.

Ling Yue Services Group Limited has called its annual general meeting for 15 June 2026 in Chengdu, where shareholders will review and adopt the audited consolidated financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025 and receive reports from the board and external auditor. Investors will also vote on the re-election of one executive, one non-executive, and one independent non-executive director, as well as authorizing the board to set directors’ pay and reappoint SHINEWING (HK) CPA Limited as auditor.

The meeting will further ask shareholders to grant a general mandate allowing the board to issue, allot, and deal in up to 20% of the company’s issued share capital, excluding treasury shares and certain exempted issuances such as rights issues and employee share schemes. data.title: TransThera Showcases Tinengotinib Data on Endocrine Resistance in HR+ Breast Cancer at AACR 2026
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

TransThera Sciences (Nanjing). Inc. ( (HK:2617) ) has provided an update.

TransThera Sciences (Nanjing), Inc. has highlighted new research at the 2026 American Association for Cancer Research Annual Meeting showing that lineage plasticity, driven by convergent FGFR-JAK signaling, is a key mechanism of resistance to endocrine therapy in HR-positive breast cancer. Using single-cell transcriptomics and resistant tumor models, the company’s team identified a luminal-to-basal transition with ER and PR downregulation that arises in primary tumors and intensifies in metastases, particularly malignant pleural effusions.

The preclinical data indicate that tinengotinib (TT-00420), a dual FGFR-JAK inhibitor, can restore luminal identity and resensitize resistant HR-positive breast cancer models to endocrine therapy in vitro and in vivo, supporting dual FGFR-JAK blockade as a strategy to overcome lineage plasticity-driven resistance. This work underpins an ongoing phase II clinical trial of tinengotinib combined with endocrine therapy in advanced HR-positive breast cancer and reinforces the drug’s broader potential across solid tumors where it already holds multiple regulatory designations, bolstering TransThera’s positioning in the competitive oncology therapeutics market.

More about TransThera Sciences (Nanjing). Inc.

TransThera Sciences (Nanjing), Inc. is a China-based biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering and developing targeted oncology therapies, particularly multi-kinase inhibitors for solid tumors. Its lead asset tinengotinib, an NDA-stage, multi-kinase inhibitor targeting FGFRs, VEGFRs, Aurora A/B and JAK, is being evaluated globally in multiple cancer indications and holds orphan drug and fast-track designations in major markets.

Nuobikan Artificial Intelligence Technology (Chengdu) Co. Ltd. has signed a strategic cooperation framework agreement with Inspur Smart City Technology, a leading Chinese smart city construction and operations firm, to jointly develop AI-driven solutions for urban management and digital infrastructure. The collaboration, with an estimated cooperation scale of about RMB500 million, will focus on applications in areas such as urban operations, infrastructure safety, economic analysis and smart communities, leveraging Nuobikan’s AI platform and Inspur’s nationwide smart city footprint to boost Nuobikan’s market penetration, brand influence and long-term competitiveness in the AI + smart city segment.

The agreement, which currently does not constitute a notifiable or connected transaction under Hong Kong listing rules, is seen by Nuobikan as a key strategic deployment that could create a replicable and sustainable business synergy model across smart city, urban governance and industrial intelligence, underpinning future performance growth while expanding its presence in the national market for AI applications.

Nanhua Futures Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2691) ) just unveiled an update.

Nanhua Futures Co., Ltd., a PRC-based futures and derivatives broker listed in Hong Kong, reported strong growth for the first quarter of 2026 on an unaudited basis under PRC Accounting Standards. The company continues to expand its balance sheet, with total assets and shareholders’ equity both rising compared with the end of last year.

For the three months ended 31 March 2026, operating revenue rose 60.66% year-on-year to RMB 433.1 million, while net profit attributable to shareholders surged 138.82% to RMB 204.8 million. Profitability and capital efficiency improved, as basic earnings per share doubled to RMB 0.29 and weighted average return on net assets increased by 1.54 percentage points to 3.61%.

Operating cash flow also turned sharply positive, with net cash inflow from operating activities of RMB 5.32 billion versus a significant outflow a year earlier, signaling improved liquidity management and business momentum. Total assets climbed 19.32% to RMB 78.12 billion and equity attributable to shareholders increased 2.88%, underscoring a stronger financial position that may support the company’s competitive stance and risk-bearing capacity in the futures industry.

More about Nanhua Futures Co., Ltd. Class H

Nanhua Futures Co., Ltd. is a PRC-incorporated joint stock company engaged in the futures and derivatives brokerage industry, with its H-shares listed in Hong Kong. The group operates through Hong Kong subsidiaries to serve both onshore and offshore clients, offering trading, risk management and related financial services across commodity and financial futures markets.

data.title: Ferretti Sets Vote on New Three-Year Board Slate Backed by Major Shareholders
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ferretti S.p.A. ( (IT:YACHT) ) has provided an update.

Ferretti S.p.A. has called its 2026 annual general meeting for May 14, where shareholders will vote on a new three-year Board of Directors as the current mandate expires. Two major shareholders, controlling owner Ferretti International Holding and 23.25% shareholder Azúr a.s. (KKCG Maritime), have each submitted lists of board candidates under Italian list-voting rules that require independence and gender balance.

Ferretti International Holding proposes a nine-member board, including five independent directors, with annual remuneration of €40,000 per director excluding special roles, reflecting a structured governance and compensation framework. The outcome of the vote will shape Ferretti’s future governance, potentially influencing strategic oversight and reinforcing compliance with Italian corporate governance standards important to international investors.

More about Ferretti S.p.A.

Ferretti S.p.A. is an Italy-based joint-stock company active in the luxury yachting sector and listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The group designs and manufactures high-end recreational boats and superyachts, serving an international clientele and attracting strategic investors, including a controlling shareholder and a significant maritime-focused investor holding over 20% of its shares.

data.title: Wasion Plans HK$1.5 Billion Top-Up Share Placing and Subscription
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Wasion Holdings Limited ( (HK:3393) ) has shared an announcement.

Wasion Holdings Limited has entered into a placing and subscription agreement involving a top-up placing of up to 50,000,000 existing shares and a matching subscription of up to 50,000,000 new shares at HK$30.00 per share. Each tranche represents about 5.02% of the current issued share capital and approximately 4.78% of the enlarged share capital, with the new shares to be issued under the company’s general mandate.

The transaction, coordinated by placing agents on a best-efforts basis, is structured so that the vendor sells existing shares to investors and then subscribes for an equivalent number of new shares, effectively replenishing the company’s capital base. The deal remains conditional on various requirements, including approval for listing of the new shares on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, and the company has cautioned shareholders and potential investors that the placing and subscription may or may not proceed.

More about Wasion Holdings Limited

Wasion Holdings Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed in Hong Kong, operates in the broader technology and industrial sector, focusing on products and services that involve equity financing through the capital markets. The company uses share placements and subscriptions under general mandates as part of its treasury and capital management strategy to support ongoing corporate development and maintain market presence.
